texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Important Notes
texts.text: Important Notes

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For a cancellation within 48 hours from noon of the arrival date or in case of no-show, 100% of the booking value will be charged. Check-in time is 12:00 pm; check-out is 10:00 am.
texts.text: For a cancellation within 48 hours from noon of the arrival date or in case of no-show, 100% of the booking value will be charged. Check-in time is 12:00 pm; check-out is 10:00 am.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Early check-in from 6:00 am will be charged at 50% of room rate. Check-in before 6:00 am will be charged 100% of room rate. Late check-out until 6:00 pm will be charged at 50% of room rate. Rooms vacated after 6:00 pm will be charged 100% of room rate. General terms and conditions apply.
texts.text: Early check-in from 6:00 am will be charged at 50% of room rate. Check-in before 6:00 am will be charged 100% of room rate. Late check-out until 6:00 pm will be charged at 50% of room rate. Rooms vacated after 6:00 pm will be charged 100% of room rate. General terms and conditions apply.
